items.title: AIDA 2.0 repository cleanup and security audit
items.summary: AIDA 2.0 is a lightweight AI asset truth-source manager focused on rules, skills, memories, summaries, and warning-only security auditing. The repository has been cleaned to keep 2.0 as the public product model while isolating any remaining internal runtime compatibility code.
highlights: Top-level CLI reduced to init, sync, doctor, rules, skills, memory, and mcp.
Security audit supports package-manager-native dependency auditing plus recursive skill risk scanning.
Repository-local truth sources were rebuilt to remove 1.0 dashboard and run-data noise.
